title: hedysarum montanum
intro: Hedysarum montanum, also known as Indian sweet pea or snow-queen, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hedysarum montanum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Hedysarum montanum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
